summary: Re-tested Schedule calendar CSS fix. Selected day now visibly renders with bg-brand-signal (rgb(255,42,0)) and white text. Full booking flow works end-to-end (date -> time slot -> name -> email -> submit -> success message). Past dates and Sundays properly disabled. Month navigation buttons render.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar fix verified: selected day computed style backgroundColor=rgb(255,42,0), color=rgb(255,255,255), class contains bg-brand-signal, aria-selected=true. Full form submission returns success message 'Confirmed - See you soon.' Time slot dropdown offers 8 options. 401 console errors observed on unrelated resources (likely admin endpoints) but not affecting the public schedule flow.
rca of the issue: Original issue: Calendar selected-day used default shadcn bg-primary (near-black) over black brand-void background, making selection invisible. Fix overrode classNames.day_selected to bg-brand-signal (#FF2A00) with white text — now clearly visible. Verified via computed styles.
